title: nf-meta-mhcquant2epp_peptide pipeline parameters
description: Adapter that turns nf-core/mhcquant's own samplesheet plus its per-Sample_Condition peptide TSV output into the sample,alleles,mhc_class,filename samplesheet nf-core/epitopeprediction requires as --input.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: The mhcquant samplesheet, its peptide-output directory, and where the epitopeprediction samplesheet is written.

samplesheet.description: Path to the samplesheet mhcquant's --input consumes (or a superset of it).
samplesheet.help_text: One row per raw MS replicate file, at minimum containing the columns named by sample_col/condition_col/alleles_col/mhc_class_col. The SAME file handed to mhcquant works directly as long as alleles/mhc_class columns are added -- mhcquant's own schema has no additionalProperties:false, so the extra columns are safely ignored by mhcquant. Always parsed as comma-separated, regardless of file extension.
samplesheet.errorMessage: samplesheet must be a valid, existing file path.

mhcquant_outdir.description: Directory containing mhcquant's per-Sample_Condition peptide TSVs (e.g. HLE_p1011.tsv).
mhcquant_outdir.errorMessage: mhcquant_outdir must be a valid, existing directory path.

outdir.description: Directory the output samplesheet.csv (and conflicts.tsv, if any) are written to.

column_options.title: Column name options
column_options.description: Names of the samplesheet columns to read. Defaults match mhcquant's own required casing for sample_col/condition_col, so the same samplesheet mhcquant consumes can be handed to this adapter unmodified once alleles/mhc_class columns are added.

sample_col.description: Column holding the cell line / sample name.
sample_col.help_text: Combined with condition_col's value as '<sample_col>_<condition_col>' to derive the Sample_Condition key mhcquant's per-condition output filenames are keyed by.

alleles_col.description: Column holding the semicolon-separated HLA allele list, e.g. 'A*02:01;A*31:01;B*18:01;B*40:01'.
alleles_col.help_text: Not part of mhcquant's schema, so lowercase by default rather than following mhcquant's casing -- there's no casing constraint forcing a particular choice.

mhc_class_col.description: Column holding the MHC class ('I' or 'II').
